description: Returns all profiles accessible to a user, optionally filtered by customer and name substring. Calls IProfileRepository which queries ProfileUserMappings JOIN Profiles. Used for profile selector UI.
name: GetProfilesForUser
signature: GetProfilesbyUserId(userId, customerId, filter, includeSystemProfile, includeCustomer) → IReadOnlyCollection<Profile>
trigger: User selects profile context. Profile selector in UI.

description: Checks ProfileUserMappings for a row with matching (ProfileId, UserId). Gate for all profile context switches and profile-scoped data access.
name: CanUserAccessProfile
trigger: Profile selection, API calls verifying profile access.

description: Creates a new Profile row. Sets DateCreatedUtc. Profile requires CustomerId, ProfileTypeId, Name, CountryId, LanguageId, TimeZoneId.
name: InsertProfile
trigger: Admin creates new profile via UI or API.

description: Updates one or multiple profiles. Sets DateLastUpdatedUtc. Cache invalidated for ProfileRolesByProfile key.
name: UpdateProfile

description: Sets Profile.Deleted=true, sets DateDeletedUtc. Soft delete. CleanupDeactivatedProfiles batch job later removes PII from profiles >120 days deleted.
name: DeleteProfile

description: Insert/delete rows in ProfileRoleMappings. Cache invalidated immediately. Profile roles determine all operational capabilities.
name: AddRemoveProfileRoles

description: Insert/delete rows in ProfileUserMappings. Grants or revokes user access to profile. Customer membership does NOT auto-grant profile access.
name: ManageProfileUsers

description: Returns Profile with full Customer object included. Optional userId adds ProfileUserMappings check. Primary method for loading active profile context.
name: GetProfileById
trigger: Per-request context resolution, profile detail view.

description: GetApiKeys/CreateApiKey/UpdateApiKey/DeleteApiKey — manages ProfileApiKeys for external API access scoped to a profile.
name: ManageApiKeys

description: CreateLogo/UpsertLogo/DeleteLogo — stores ProfileLogo row (binary or storage reference). Used for profile-branded notifications.
name: ManageLogo

description: IProfileStorageService.AddToAzureBlobStorrage(), InsertFile(), GetAllProfileStorageFiles(), DeleteFile() — manages file uploads per profile. Files stored in Azure Blob, metadata in ProfileStorageFiles.
name: ManageProfileStorage
trigger: User uploads file to profile storage.

description: GetWebMessageModuleProfilesByCustomerId/Insert/Update/Delete WebMessageModuleProfile — configures which profiles are linked to web message modules.
name: ManageWebMessageModuleProfile
trigger: Admin configures web message module for profile.

description: Batch job (ServiceAlertBatchAction.cleanup_deactivated_profiles) runs CleanupDeactivatedProfiles stored procedure. Nulls PII fields on profiles with DateDeletedUtc older than 120 days. Renames profile to 'Name (DELETED)'. Deletes all child records (EmailWhitelist, FtpSettings, RoleMappings, UserMappings, etc.)
name: CleanupDeactivatedProfiles
